summary: Full e2e testing of Vibe Check MVP — backend (pytest 10/10 pass) and frontend (manual city flow end-to-end pass). All requested features work as specified.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py (~370 lines) is within acceptable size but consolidates models, config, utilities, and routes — consider splitting into routers/, models/, services/ modules if the app grows.
GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY is committed in /app/backend/.env — acceptable for dev but should be rotated/secret-managed for production.
Unused MongoDB client (mongo_url, db) kept for template consistency — remove if not needed to reduce dead code.
generate_vibes: LlmChat is imported inside the function on every call; consider caching the chat instance or at least lifting the import to module level for perf.
recommend endpoint: distance filter of 1500m is hard-coded along with radius=1500 — consider making these constants for future tuning.
No rate-limiting or request caching on /api/recommend — each call hits Google Places + Claude; could be abused or spike costs.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tested at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (10 tests all green, ~11s runtime). Frontend tested via manual-city flow with 'New York' (geolocation unavailable in automation). All stages verified: location -> picker -> loading -> results -> back/try-again/change-location navigation. Pick cards render with name, vibe (Claude-generated), rating, distance, open_now status, price level, maps link. Dark theme (#0f0f0f) + amber (#f5a623) + Unbounded display font render correctly. Share button present but Web Share API not exercised in automation (falls back to clipboard — not tested in headless).
